query:
SELECT wh.id, wh.gestanteId, wh.templateId, wh.telefone, wh.status, wh.nomeGestante, wh.sentAt, 
       LEFT(wh.mensagem, 200) as mensagemPreview,
       wh.erroMensagem
FROM whatsappHistorico wh
WHERE wh.nomeGestante LIKE '%Luc%ola%'
AND DATE(wh.sentAt) = CURDATE()
ORDER BY wh.sentAt DESC
